Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-7168 affecting package curl for versions less than 8.11.1-7
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-7168 affecting package curl for versions less than 8.11.1-7. A patched version of the package is available.

Criterion.Comment: Package curl is earlier than 8.11.1-7, affected by CVE-2026-7168
